introduction: The Desert Voices tell the story of three destinies : 1- Mouloud's voice: Mouloud is a young man who travels to the desert in search of his parents whom he never. 2- Hammadi's voice: Hammadi is an old man who is desperately waiting for this son's return from abroad. 3- Zineb's voice: Zineb is young woman who goes back to her roots. By conducting a research, she aims at safeguarding of the oral heritage of her native region. These three voices are intimately linked by the voice of a message contained in a bottle filled with sand and traveling from one place to another through people who do not know its content.
